findings.evidence: grep hits: exact theorem at lines 61-69 repeats the same `setOf_finiteDimensional_discr_natAbs_le_subset_abs_discr_le`/`NumberField.finite_of_discr_bdd` pattern used by the more general theorem at lines 75-84.
findings.fix: Prove the threshold-monotone natAbs theorem first, then derive the exact-constant theorem with `le_rfl` instead of repeating the `Set.ncard_le_ncard` argument.
findings.issue: `ncard_setOf_finiteDimensional_discr_natAbs_le_le_hermiteCountBound` duplicates the subset/ncard proof even though it is the `M = N` case of `ncard_setOf_finiteDimensional_discr_natAbs_le_le_of_threshold_le`.

summary: The natural-discriminant statements are at the right public shape, but one proof is a duplicated special case of a more general theorem introduced in the same file.
